$comment: puzzleDrag2 Balance Profile — the machine-readable per-game state the /game-balance skill reads on load. Theory lives in the skill's handbook; this file holds ONLY game-specifics. Keep it in sync after a balance pass (skill workflow step 9).
genre: single-player, turn-based, transitive economy (tile-drag match/merge farming with a zone-tier progression spine)
generatedFrom: codebase exploration + the campaign pacing harness

goals.$status: captured 2026-06-22 via the skill's goals interview
goals.targetPlayer: mid-core (multiple sessions/day) as the baseline segment; casual & power on either side
goals.sessionShape: ~2-3 sessions/day; a session ~= one farm run (~10 turns)
goals.intendedTimeToContent: STEADY ~1-2 weeks to mid-game (found 2nd settlement + grow home to City/tier 3) -> ~20-35 mid-core sessions
goals.feel: balanced middle — cozy surface, light strategy; enough economic tension that choices matter, but few hard walls
constraints: save-compatibility — value tweaks are safe; structural/persisted-shape changes need a SAVE_SCHEMA bump + migration
don't silently break the family-value or campaign snapshot tests (update them intentionally)

kpiTargets.$note: Derived from goals by working backward (mid-core ~2.5 sessions/day, steady ~1-2 weeks). Deliberately rough; refine against the campaign sim once it models buildings/crafting/mine. 'current' = what the harness/trace measures today.

home_found_2_affordable_coins.current: ~2 (coins arrive too fast to be a real gate; the true gate is completing home)

knobs.name: TILES_PER_RESOURCE
knobs.controls: income divisor: tiles chained per 1 inventory unit

knobs.name: UPGRADE_THRESHOLDS
knobs.controls: board upgrade gate: chains to upgrade a tile (decoupled from income)

knobs.name: BUILDINGS[].cost
knobs.controls: building construction cost (gates completion + tier climb)

knobs.name: ZONES[].entryCost
knobs.controls: coins to start a session in a zone (home=50)

knobs.name: tiers[].upgradeCost
knobs.controls: settlement tier-up cost (coins + zone-inventory resources; rung 0 free)

knobs.name: requiresZoneTier
knobs.controls: zone unlock gate (e.g. quarry requires home tier 3) — the lever for the progression-stall finding

knobs.name: boards.farm.seasonDrops / upgradeMap
knobs.controls: per-zone tile spawn rates + chain-upgrade redirects

formulas.chainCoins: perChain = max(1, floor(chainLength * tileValue)) + coinHookBonus; then * coin_gain_mult boon. Source: src/state.ts:454. ~LINEAR in chain length.
formulas.resourceAccrual: progress[res] += chainLength; whole units = floor(progress / TILES_PER_RESOURCE[tile]); remainder carried. Source: src/state.ts:392-416.
formulas.realizedValuePerTile: ITEMS[res].value / TILES_PER_RESOURCE[tile]  — the dominant-strategy / distance-from-power-curve metric (family-value spread audit).
formulas.foundingCost: round(300 * 1.7^(k-1)) for the k-th founding -> 300, 510, 867, 1474, ... EXPONENTIAL sink. Source: src/features/zones/data.ts:404.
formulas.netCoinsPerRun: chainCoins(earned this run) - entryCost(50 home) + SEASON_END_BONUS_COINS(25) + buildingBonuses.
formulas.turnBudget: max(1, floor((baseTurns + additive + bonus) * (useFertilizer?2:1))). Home baseTurns=10. Source: src/features/zones/data.ts:192.

converters: board upgradeMap (chain a tile -> spawn a higher-tier tile)

harness.perRun: npm run playtest -- --zones home --runs 10 --seed 1   (coins/run, coins/turn, family-value spread, change-list)
harness.campaign: npm run playtest -- --campaign --zones home --runs 30 --seed 1   (runs-to-coin-milestone + tier-stall pacing)
harness.tests: npx vitest run src/__tests__/playtest-harness.test.ts   (determinism + snapshot drift guard)
harness.code: src/playtest/  (run.ts per-run loop, campaign.ts pacing loop, metrics.ts spread, targets.ts bands)
harness.knownGap: the campaign sim is FARM-board-only and does not model crafting/buildings/mine, so it cannot yet validate a fix to the progression stall end-to-end. Extending it (or a manual trace) is the first tooling task of the pass.

zoneCoinTargets.$note: deliberately wide v1 bands; tighten from a real pass

progressionTargets.$note: updated toward the steady ~1-2 week goal; was [2,12]/[4,20]

findings.summary: Home cannot progress past Outpost (tier 0) without mine goods (block/iron_bar), but mine goods come ONLY from the quarry, which carries requiresZoneTier {zone: home, tier: 3 (City)} — and home->City itself needs mine goods. A circular lock. Evidence: at tier 0 only the free Hearth is farm-buildable; the Bakery needed to craft bread (Hamlet's gate) costs block; Mill/Granary need block+iron_bar; completing home to found the next settlement needs ~4 buildings that need block; starting inventory has no mine goods and the market cannot buy them. Almost certainly a side-effect of PR #1299 (zones-as-spine) not reconciling the authored home tier/building costs.
findings.confirmed: HARD LOCK. CARTO/TRAVEL enforces the gate (src/features/cartography/slice.ts:78 returns state unchanged when zoneTierGateReason fails), so a fresh save cannot even TRAVEL to the quarry — let alone mine — until home is City. The player is stuck at home Outpost. (Residual uncertainty: story/quest grants not yet traced; a fresh-save manual playtest would confirm 100%.)
findings.lever: src/features/cartography/data.ts:344 — the quarry's requiresZoneTier {zone: home, tier: 3}. Lower/re-gate it so the mine opens early, AND/OR re-cost the early home tiers + tier-0 buildings so the first rungs don't demand mine goods before the mine is reachable.
findings.source: building-cost + gate trace (CARTO/TRAVEL slice.ts:78); campaign harness

findings.summary: Realized value-per-tile spans ~10x (pearls ~133/tile vs pie ~12.9/tile; anything >3x median flagged). The per-run harness already emits a compression change-list toward a 3-4x ceiling.

Coins reach the founding price in ~2 runs — far faster than the steady ~1-2 week goal. Coins are NOT the pacing gate today (progression resources are). For the 'balanced middle' feel, consider making coins a softer secondary gate (raise founding/tier coin costs or trim an early faucet) once progression is unblocked.

openQuestions: Is the quarry's home-City gate intended, or should the mine open earlier so home can climb its ladder? (objective 1 — the single highest-leverage change)
Is the quarry tier-gate enforced for travel/PLAY, or only for FOUND_SETTLEMENT? (decides hard-lock vs awkward-ordering)
Compress the family-value spread toward a 3-4x ceiling (per the auto change-list), or keep a premium for marquee resources? (objective 2)
Confirm constraints: no real-money; saves must survive value tweaks.
